title: assign whole+slot, sequential, old
manager: The assignment statement — set a whole val or a slot within it, in sequence, with `old` available to name a slot's pre-transition value. This is how a machine mutates its extended state deliberately and observably: assignments are journaled so they can roll back cleanly on a contract failure, and `old` is what lets an `ensure` clause compare after to before. Mutation with a memory and an undo, not a free-for-all.
cs: whole-val + slot assignment, sequential semantics; `old` binds the pre-macrostep value; journaled for rollback (W6.69); the assign grammar itself is unfiled (carrier is fsl#1355-adjacent).
